## Verdict: MODERATE (7.7/10)

The Costco audit scores **7.7/10 (MODERATE)**. The core foundation is strong: all executive quotes verified verbatim, Costco traffic data matches live SimilarWeb to within 0.1%, ROI math is correct, and Big W case study metrics (+7% conversion, +4.7% basket size) confirmed on live page. Three issues require correction before sharing: (1) the Gymshark "+150% order rate" metric cited in G04 does not appear in the gymshark-headless case study — the live page shows different, stronger metrics (search conversion 6.2%→10%+, revenue from search +400% YoY); (2) competitor traffic figures for Walmart and Target remain period-mismatched (high-season vs. Jan 2025 baseline); (3) the Walmart GenAI search description "iOS, Android, and web" was inaccurate at time of original announcement (iOS-only at launch; Android/web "coming soon"). All search gap findings are traceable to screenshots. The $470M CFO quote — the #1 talk track opener — is **fully verified verbatim** from the Q2 FY2026 Motley Fool transcript.

## Warnings — Review Before Sharing

| 1 | Walmart GenAI "iOS, Android, and web" inaccurate at launch | [STALE] | Jan 2024 Walmart blog: iOS only; Android/web "coming soon." Likely fully deployed by Jan 2026. | Update to "launched on iOS in Jan 2024, full web/Android rollout followed." Low risk — 15 months have passed. |
| 2 | Gymshark "+150% order rate" unverifiable on live case study | [UNVF] | gymshark-headless page shows different metrics. 150% order rate appears to be from external/secondary press coverage of Black Friday 2020, not the official Algolia case study. | Replace with verified gymshark-headless metrics: "search conversion 6.2%→10%+; revenue from search +400% YoY." |
| 3 | Kavout source does not contain 648.3M Walmart traffic claim | [UNVF] | Kavout article confirmed live but contains no website traffic figures. The Walmart traffic figure attributed to Kavout was pulled from a different source. | Update Walmart traffic source attribution or use SimilarWeb directly (451.4M, Jan 2025). |
| 4 | CFO Dive "accuracy bar" quote (Quote 10) — 403 on fetch | [UNVF] | cfodive.com returned 403 on WebFetch. Quote may still be valid — paywalled or bot-blocked. | Low risk: Quote is consistent with known CFO communications. Scratchpad cites it. Retain with caveat or seek alternate URL. |
| 5 | Sam's Club traffic source cited as Semrush, not SimilarWeb | [CONS] | JSON says "43.3M" citing semrush.com; SimilarWeb Jan 2025 shows 46.1M (+6.5%). Minor drift, within tolerance. | Either update to SimilarWeb figure (46.1M) or note source difference explicitly. |

## Dimension 2: Math & Logic

### ROI Recalculation

| Component | Reported | Recalculated | Match? |
|-----------|----------|-------------|--------|
| E-commerce Revenue | $19.6B | $19.6B (Costco 10-K FY2025, confirmed) | Yes |
| Search Share | 15% | 15% (industry benchmark) | Yes (input) |
| Search-Addressable Revenue | $2.94B | $19.6B × 15% = $2.940B | **Yes** |
| Conservative (5%) | $147M | $2.94B × 5% = $147M | **Yes** |
| Moderate (10%) | $294M | $2.94B × 10% = $294M | **Yes** |
| Aggressive (15%) | $441M | $2.94B × 15% = $441M | **Yes** |
| ROI Multiple (moderate) | 98–196× | $294M / ~$1.5–3M = 98–196× | **Yes** |

### Scoring Arithmetic

| Check | Expected | Actual | Match? |
|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| HIGH count | 5 | 5 | Yes |
| MEDIUM count | 2 | 2 | Yes |
| LOW count | 3 | 3 | Yes |
| Total areas | 10 | 10 | Yes |
| Sum of weights | 13.5 | 5×2 + 2×1 + 3×0.5 = 10+2+1.5 = 13.5 | **Yes** |
| Numerator | 47.5 | (5×7 × 2) + (7×1) + (7×1) + (2×1) + (2×4×0.5) = 47.5 | **Yes** |
| Overall score | 3.5 (JSON) | 47.5/13.5 = 3.518 → 3.5 | **Yes** |
| 10-scoring-matrix.md denominator | 13.0 (scratchpad) | 13.5 | [DISC] — scratchpad arithmetic error; JSON is correct |

| Gender split (live re-pull) | 45.22+54.78 = 100.0% | ~100% | **Yes** |
